page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server for inferring, displaying and parsing mRNA and microRNA gene regulatory networks. It combines sequence information with gene expression data analysis to create a disease specific, genome wide regulatory network. Only supports human and mouse.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server for inferring, displaying and parsing mRNA and microRNA gene regulatory networks. It combines sequence information with gene expression data analysis to create a disease specific, genome wide regulatory network. Only supports human and mouse.
